mapper.select: select er.enroll_id as enrollId, er.enroll_no as enrollNo, er.user_id as userId, er.participant_id as participantId, er.contest_id as contestId, er.order_id as orderId, er.audit_status as auditStatus, c.contest_name as contestName, c.price as contestPrice, c.partner_id as partnerId, c.aftersale_days as aftersaleDays, c.event_end_time as eventEndTime, c.support_points_deduct as supportPointsDeduct from jst_enroll_record er inner join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = er.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where er.enroll_id = #{enrollId} and er.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.update: update jst_enroll_record set order_id = #{orderId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where enroll_id = #{enrollId} and order_id is null and del_flag = '0'
